messages.content: You are an agent with access to three tools: web_search(query), read_file(path), and run_shell(command). A user asks: 'What's the latest Python version installed on this machine, and is it newer than the one mentioned in my requirements.txt?' Explain — in order — which tools you would call, with exact arguments, and why. Do NOT call tools you don't need, and don't guess where a single tool call could answer the question.

**Step 1 – Find the installed Python version**  
Call `run_shell` with the command  

```
python3 --version
```  

*Why?* This directly queries the default Python interpreter on the machine and returns its version string (e.g., “Python 3.11.4”). It gives us the “latest” version currently active on the system.

---

**Step 2 – Read the version requirement from the project**  
Call `read_file` with the path  

```
requirements.txt
```  

*Why?* The `requirements.txt` file typically contains a line such as `python>=3.8` (or a specific version). Reading this file lets us extract the version constraint that the project expects.

---

**Step 3 – Compare the two version strings**  
After obtaining the installed version from Step 1 and the required version from Step 2, you can compare them manually (or with a tiny Python snippet like `python3 -c "import sys; from packaging.version import Version; print('Newer' if Version(sys.version.split()[0]) >= Version('3.8') else 'Older')"`). This tells you whether the installed Python is newer than the requirement.

*No other tools are needed.* `web_search` is unnecessary because all required information is available locally, and we avoid trying to combine the two distinct pieces of information into a single call.

Build a complete, single-page social media platform landing page website using only HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks). The design should be dark-themed and sleek. Include: focus-visible styles for keyboard navigation; progress stepper component tracking a multi-step flow; hero section with a full-screen background image and CTA button. Use semantic HTML5, ensure full mobile responsiveness, and write clean, commented code.

Nexus.
  • Home
  • Features
  • Join

Connect Without Limits.

Experience the next generation of social interaction. Secure, fast, and ad-free.

Get Started

Why Nexus?

Privacy First

End-to-end encryption ensures your conversations stay between you.

Lightning Fast

Built on a modern protocol for zero-latency streaming and messaging.

Infinite Scroll

AI-powered feeds tailored to your actual interests, not advertisers.

Create Account

Ready to Launch

All set! Click below to launch into the Nexus universe.

🚀 Account ready for liftoff.

```css /* --- 1. Variables & Reset --- */ :root { /* Color Palette */ --bg-dark: #0a0a0a; --bg-card: #161616; --bg-input: #222222; --text-main: #ffffff; --text-muted: #a1a1a1; --accent-color: #00f2ff; /* Neon Cyan */ --accent-hover: #00c3d1; --error-color: #ff4d4d; /* Spacing */ --container-width: 1200px; --padding-section: 80px 20px; /* Transitions */ --transition-speed: 0.3s; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } body { background-color: var(--bg-dark); color: var(--text-main); font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; overflow-x: hidden; } a { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: var(--transition-speed); } ul { list-style: none; } .container { max-width: var(--container-width); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 20px; } /* --- 2. Focus Visibility (Accessibility) --- */ /* Removes standard outline on mouse click, keeps it for keyboard tabbing */ *:focus { outline: none; } *:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--accent-color); outline-offset: 4px; } /* --- 3. Navigation --- */ .navbar { position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); padding: 20px 0; z-index: 1000; border-bottom: 1px solid #333; } .nav-container { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .logo { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -1px; } .logo span { color: var(--accent-color); } .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 30px; } .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--accent-color); } .mobile-menu-btn { display: none; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; } .mobile-menu-btn span { width: 25px; height: 3px; background: var(--bg-card); transition: var(--transition-speed); } /* --- 4. Hero Section --- */ .hero-section { height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; position: relative; /* Dark abstract tech background */ background-image: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550751827-4bd374c3f58b?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop'); background-size: cover; background-position: center; background-attachment: fixed; } .hero-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); /* Dark overlay for readability */ } .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 700px; } .hero-content h1 { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 20px; line-height: 1.1; } .hero-content p { font-size: 1.2rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 40px; } .cta-button { display: inline-block; background: var(--accent-color); color: var(--bg-dark); padding: 15px 40px; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 1.1rem; transition: var(--transition-speed); } .cta-button:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.3); } /* --- 5. Features Section --- */ .features-section { padding: var(--padding-section); background: var(--bg-dark); } .features-section h2 { text-align: center; font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 60px; } .features-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; } .feature-card { background: var(--bg-card); padding: 40px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #333; transition: var(--transition-speed); } .feature-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); border-color: var(--accent-color); } .feature-card h3 { color: var(--accent-color); margin-bottom: 15px; } /* --- 6. Signup / Stepper Section --- */ .signup-section { padding: 100px 20px; background: #0f0f0f; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .form-wrapper { background: var(--bg-card); padding: 50px; border-radius: 20px; width: 100%; max-width: 600px; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .form-wrapper h2 { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 40px; } /* Stepper Visuals */ .stepper-wrapper { margin-bottom: 40px; } .stepper-container { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; position: relative; } .step { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; z-index: 2; opacity: 0.5; transition: var(--transition-speed); } .step.active { opacity: 1; } .step-circle { width: 40px; height: 40px; background: #333; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 10px; transition: var(--transition-speed); } .step.active .step-circle { background: var(--accent-color); color: var(--bg-dark); } .step-label { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; } .step-line { flex: 1; height: 2px; background: #333; margin: 0 10px; margin-bottom: 30px; /* Align with circles */ } /* Form Content */ .form-step { display: none; /* Hidden by default */ animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease; } .form-step.active { display: block; } .input-group { margin-bottom: 20px; } .input-group label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .input-group input, .input-group textarea { width: 100%; padding: 15px; background: var(--bg-input); border: 1px solid #444; border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text-main); font-size: 1rem; transition: var(--transition-speed); } .input-group input:focus, .input-group textarea:focus { border-color: var(--accent-color); } .form-actions { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 30px; } .btn-next, .btn-submit { margin-left: auto; background: var(--accent-color); color: var(--bg-dark); padding: 12px 30px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-speed); } .btn-prev { background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted); padding: 12px 30px; border: 1px solid #444; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .btn-next:hover, .btn-submit:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); } .success-message { text-align: center; padding: 20px; background: rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: var(--accent-color); } /* --- 7. Footer --- */ footer { text-align: center; padding: 40px; color: #555; font-size: 0.9rem; border-top: 1px solid #222; } /* Animations */ @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } /* --- 8. Mobile Responsiveness --- */ @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero-content h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; } .nav-links { display: none; /* Hidden by default on mobile */ position: absolute; top: 70px; left: 0; width: 100%; background: var(--bg-card); flex-direction: column; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #333; } .nav-links.active { display: flex; } .mobile-menu-btn { display: flex; } .form-wrapper { padding: 30px 20px; } .stepper-container { overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 10px;} } ``` ```javascript /** * Nexus Landing Page Logic * - Handles Mobile Navigation Toggle * - Manages Multi-Step Form State & Validation */ document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { /* --- 1. Mobile Navigation Logic --- */ const menuBtn = document.querySelector('.mobile-menu-btn'); const navLinks = document.querySelector('.nav-links'); menuBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { // Toggle the 'active' class on the menu navLinks.classList.toggle('active'); // Update accessibility attribute const isExpanded = navLinks.classList.contains('active'); menuBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isExpanded); }); // Close mobile menu when a link is clicked navLinks.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => { link.addEventListener('click', () => { navLinks.classList.remove('active'); menuBtn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', false); }); }); /* --- 2. Multi-Step Form Logic --- */ const form = document.getElementById('multi-step-form'); const steps = document.querySelectorAll('.step'); const formSteps = document.querySelectorAll('.form-step'); const nextBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.btn-next'); const prevBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.btn-prev'); let currentStep = 0; // Tracks which step we are on (0-indexed based on .form-step) // Function to update the visual state of the stepper and form function updateFormStep() { // Update Step Circles (Visual Indicator) steps.forEach((step, idx) => { if (idx <= currentStep) { step.classList.add('active'); } else { step.classList.remove('active'); } }); // Show/Hide Form Content formSteps.forEach((step, idx) => { if (idx === currentStep) { step.classList.add('active'); } else { step.classList.remove('active'); } }); } // Validation Helper function validateStep() { const currentInputs = formSteps[currentStep].querySelectorAll('input, textarea'); let isValid = true; currentInputs.forEach(input => { // Reset border color first, then check validity input.style.borderColor = '#444'; if (input.hasAttribute('required') && !input.value.trim()) { isValid = false; input.style.borderColor = 'var(--error-color)'; } else if (input.type === 'password' && input.value.length < 8) { isValid = false; input.style.borderColor = 'var(--error-color)'; } }); return isValid; } // Event Listeners for Next Buttons nextBtns.forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => { if (validateStep()) { if (currentStep < formSteps.length - 1) { currentStep++; updateFormStep(); } } else { alert('Please fill in all required fields.'); } }); }); // Event Listeners for Previous Buttons prevBtns.forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => { if (currentStep > 0) { currentStep--; updateFormStep(); } }); }); // Handle Final Submission form.addEventListener('submit', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); alert('Welcome to Nexus! Your account has been created.'); // Here you would typically send data to a server form.reset(); currentStep = 0; updateFormStep(); }); }); ```
